description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical trash bin with a smooth, matte finish and a flat, circular lid. The bin features a prominent foot pedal at the base, which is used to open the lid without using hands, making it hygienic for public or private use. On the rear side, there is a sturdy, rectangular handle for easy lifting or repositioning. The lid is attached with a visible hinge mechanism, ensuring it remains securely fastened when closed. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible labeling or signage, and the color is a uniform dark gray. The bin appears to be made primarily of metal, likely stainless steel, with some plastic components for the pedal and hinge.
description: A cylindrical, matte-finished trash bin with a flat lid, foot pedal, and rear handle, all in dark gray. The design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, flat lid, and the hinge mechanism on the left, with the foot pedal partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the centrally positioned foot pedal at the base and the smooth, unmarked surface of the bin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the hinge mechanism on the right and the foot pedal clearly visible on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rectangular handle at the top center and the seamless back surface.
